specs: Intel N100 (4-core Alder Lake-N) | 12th Gen | TDP: 6W | 1L form factor | e.g. Beelink EQ12 / Minisforum UN100L / Lenovo ThinkCentre M75q Tiny
notes: Prefer units with original PSU brick. Verify BIOS update availability. N100 supports AES-NI for encryption. Alternative: Refurbished HP EliteDesk 800 G4 Mini.

specs: 16GB DDR5-4800 SO-DIMM | Single stick | Upgradeable to 32GB
notes: Buy new if refurbished unavailable — SO-DIMM failure rates are higher. Samsung or Crucial preferred for longevity.

specs: M.2 2280 NVMe PCIe 3.0 | 512GB | e.g. Crucial P3 / WD Blue SN570
notes: Refurbished enterprise NVMe (Samsung PM983 class) acceptable if S.M.A.R.T. verified clean. Run smartctl before deployment.

specs: USB 3.0 Flash Drive | 32GB minimum | e.g. Samsung FIT Plus
notes: Used as Iskander OS installer/live boot medium. Must be USB 3.0+ for acceptable flash speed. Replace after 3 installs.

specs: 600VA / 360W | Pure sine wave preferred | USB HID monitoring port | e.g. CyberPower CP600LCD / APC BE600M1
notes: USB HID port mandatory — Iskander OS NUT daemon reads voltage/load/battery data for Graceful Degradation. Verify NUT compatibility at networkupstools.org/stable-hcl.html

specs: INA219 or INA3221 breakout board | I2C interface | 0-26V / 3.2A per channel | e.g. Adafruit INA219
notes: Wired inline on DC barrel jack between PSU brick and Mini PC. Exposes real-time wattage to OS via I2C GPIO header or USB-I2C bridge (CP2112). Required for Permacomputing power telemetry.

specs: CP2112 USB-to-I2C/SMBus HID bridge | e.g. Adafruit CP2112 breakout
notes: Required ONLY if Mini PC has no exposed GPIO/I2C header (most 1L PCs do not). Connects INA219 sensor to a USB port. Driver supported natively in Linux kernel 4.15+.
Wired Ethernet is mandatory for node stability. Wi-Fi optional at Tier 1.

specs: USB 3.0 | 802.11ac (Wi-Fi 5) or 802.11ax (Wi-Fi 6) | AP mode capable | e.g. Alfa AWUS036ACS
notes: Optional. Required ONLY if node will serve as a wireless access point or mesh node. Must support AP mode (hostapd). Verify chipset: Realtek RTL8812AU or MediaTek MT7612U recommended.
Refurbished Mini PCs often have degraded thermal paste. Replace on first disassembly. Reduces throttling and extends CPU lifespan.

specs: Included with T1-001 refurbished unit | 1L form factor
notes: Reuse original chassis. If damaged, PLA/PETG 3D-printed replacement panels are viable at this scale.

specs: 19V or per-unit spec | 65W minimum | Universal tip set
notes: Request original adapter with ITAD purchase. Aftermarket universal adapters acceptable as backup. Verify polarity before use.
